name: Hongrun Construction Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Hongrun Construction Group Co., Ltd. engages in construction business primarily in China. It engages in rail, road, and bridge, as well as housing construction activities. The company is also involved in real estate development, infrastructure investment and construction, and solar energy businesses. In addition, it invests in building materials. Hongrun Construction Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1994 and is based in Shanghai, China.
